summary: Frontend UI testing of Tanaka vouvoiement changes for adult mode. Logged in as admin@wayofdojo.com and verified textual changes on /fr/aikido/dojo and /fr/aikido/dojo-virtuel pages. Most changes are correctly applied but there is a critical bug: the TanakaWelcome intro overlay on /fr/aikido/dojo-virtuel still displays CHILD (tutoiement) messages for the admin user because the mode-detection logic in dojo-virtuel/page.tsx does not recognize this user as adult.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin user (samouraï_confirme) still sees CHILD tutoiement message: 'Bienvenue dans le Dojo Virtuel ! Ici, tu vas t'entraîner de façon ludique ... Amuse-toi bien, jeune Samouraï !'. Also displays 'Ton guide sur la Voie' (hardcoded).
ui_bugs.selector: TanakaWelcome overlay before the Dojo modal

ui_bugs.issue: Line 309: 'Ton guide sur la Voie' is hardcoded in tutoiement with no adult-mode variant. Shows for adult users too.

integration_issues.issue: In /app/wayofdojo/src/app/[locale]/[sport]/dojo-virtuel/page.tsx, isAdultMode = user?.mode === 'adult' || user?.mode === 'samurai' || localStorage.wayofdojo_mode === 'adult'. Admin user object contains { profile: 'samourai_confirme', role: 'super_admin' } but NO 'mode' field, and localStorage 'wayofdojo_mode' is null. As a result, isAdultMode is false and TANAKA_MESSAGES (child) is used instead of TANAKA_MESSAGES_ADULT. Fix: base detection on user.profile ('samourai_confirme' or 'samourai_debutant') or on user.role.

action_items: Fix adult-mode detection in /app/wayofdojo/src/app/[locale]/[sport]/dojo-virtuel/page.tsx to correctly identify adult users based on user.profile (e.g., 'samourai_confirme', 'samourai_debutant') or role, not user.mode which is not present on the user object.

Update hardcoded string 'Ton guide sur la Voie' (TanakaWelcome.tsx line 309) to switch to 'Votre guide sur la Voie' when the component is rendered in adult mode (pass a variant/tone prop, or centralize adult vs junior copy).
Consider adding a top-level context/hook (e.g., useIsAdultMode) so every page/component uses the same detection logic instead of duplicating conditionals.
critical_code_review_comments: Adult/junior mode detection is duplicated and inconsistent across pages. Extract to a helper such as isAdultMode(user) reading from user.profile/role, then reuse everywhere TANAKA_MESSAGES is chosen.

SSR error observed in backend logs: 'ReferenceError: localStorage is not defined at .../dojo-virtuel/page.js'. localStorage reads happen inside useEffect but a synchronous read for isAdultMode may also occur during render on the server. Guard with typeof window !== 'undefined'.
TanakaWelcome exports two large message dictionaries (TANAKA_MESSAGES and TANAKA_MESSAGES_ADULT) side by side; consider unifying them into a single object keyed by tone to avoid drift.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login URL is /fr/aikido/login (NOT /fr/login which 404s). After login, admin lands on /fr/aikido/dojo. Verified: (a) Hero on /fr/aikido/dojo shows 'Votre Sensei personnel' and quote 'Continuez votre chemin vers la maîtrise' — PASS. (b) Sidebar under Maître Tanaka shows 'Votre Sensei personnel' — PASS. (c) Inside the VirtualDojo modal on /fr/aikido/dojo-virtuel, welcome message correctly says 'vous allez apprendre en jouant' and 'Prenez votre temps et amusez-vous bien !' — PASS. FAILURE: The TanakaWelcome full-page overlay that appears BEFORE the modal on /fr/aikido/dojo-virtuel still uses the CHILD version (contains 'tu vas t'entraîner', 'Amuse-toi bien, jeune Samouraï !', 'Ton guide sur la Voie') because dojo-virtuel/page.tsx checks user.mode which does not exist on admin user (profile=samourai_confirme, no mode field, localStorage wayofdojo_mode=null). Backend logs show recurring SSR error 'localStorage is not defined' on the same page — likely needs a typeof window guard.
rca of the issue: Root cause: In /app/wayofdojo/src/app/[locale]/[sport]/dojo-virtuel/page.tsx line ~40, isAdultMode is computed as `user?.mode === 'adult' || user?.mode === 'samurai' || localStorage.getItem('wayofdojo_mode') === 'adult'`. The admin user returned by /api/auth/me contains fields {role: 'super_admin', profile: 'samourai_confirme', ...} but NO 'mode' field, and localStorage 'wayofdojo_mode' is never set for admin. Therefore isAdultMode is false → TANAKA_MESSAGES (child copy with 'tu', 'jeune Samouraï') is passed to <TanakaWelcome>. Reproduction: 1) Login admin@wayofdojo.com/admin123 at /fr/aikido/login. 2) Navigate to /fr/aikido/dojo-virtuel. 3) Observe overlay text contains tutoiement and 'jeune Samouraï'. Mitigation: replace mode detection with a helper based on user.profile (samourai_confirme/samourai_debutant) or user.role. Also fix hardcoded 'Ton guide sur la Voie' in TanakaWelcome.tsx to be tone-aware.
